value.rationale: Workspace scoping in Antigravity CLI is a feature that scopes conversation histories to the current working directory, preventing context pollution across projects. This is a sub-feature of the managed agent runtime projects capability (google-antigravity-2-0-managed-agent-runtime-projects), specifically relating to scoped settings/conversations. It surfaces in the terminal (CLI) and is a partial slice of agentic-coding functionality — specifically context/session management scoped to project directories, a common agentic coding workflow concern.
